name: Release Brief
description: Turns packaged release metadata into a concise operator-facing launch brief.
compatibility: Ready for current macOS-first release workflows.

name: Runtime Snapshot
description: Captures a richer read-only runtime summary for support and validation workflows.
compatibility: Safe for local-only desktop support scenarios.

name: Migration Audit
description: Provides a local migration review checklist before apply or rollback actions.
compatibility: Pairs with the current database workspace and rollback controls.
